name: Pendo
description: Pendo is a product experience platform. Track feature usage, manage visitor and account metadata, create in-app guides, run aggregation queries, and analyze product analytics to drive adoption.

capabilities.name: events_track
capabilities.description: Send a custom server-side track event for product analytics.

capabilities.name: aggregation_query
capabilities.description: Run aggregation queries on event data for custom analytics.

capabilities.name: visitors_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve visitor details with metadata and activity.

capabilities.name: visitors_update_metadata
capabilities.description: Create or update custom metadata on a visitor record.

capabilities.name: visitors_delete
capabilities.description: Bulk-delete visitor records and associated data.

capabilities.name: accounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve account details with metadata and visitor count.

capabilities.name: accounts_update_metadata
capabilities.description: Create or update custom metadata on an account record.

capabilities.name: accounts_delete
capabilities.description: Bulk-delete account records and associated data.

capabilities.name: pages_list
capabilities.description: List all tracked pages with view counts and analytics.

capabilities.name: pages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific tracked page.

capabilities.name: features_list
capabilities.description: List all tracked features with click counts and visitor analytics.

capabilities.name: features_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve usage analytics for a specific tracked feature.

capabilities.name: guides_list
capabilities.description: List all in-app guides with status and view statistics.

capabilities.name: guides_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific in-app guide with steps and targeting.

capabilities.name: reports_list
capabilities.description: List all saved reports with types and dates.
